{{Quote|You're the one defending Sunry now, eh? Well, the hotel's open for you and I guess I got to answer any questions you want, too.|Ignus to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Ignus''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the owner and proprietor of the [[Visitor's Hotel]] in [[Ahto City]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
As one of the witnesses in the [[Sunry]] murder investigation and [[Sunry vs. the Ahto City Authority|trial]], he was interviewed by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] in his appointed capacity as the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Arbiter/Legends|arbiter]]. When questioned, he would testify to the fact that Sunry probably left after the [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shot that [[Death/Legends|killed]] the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] officer and [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]], [[Elassa Huros]].

==Behind the scenes==
If the player walked the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark path]], Revan persuaded or bribed Ignus to testify that Sunry left before the blaster shot. [[Juhani]] and [[Mission Vao]], if either one is in your party, will strongly protest this action, and [[Bastila Shan]] will also express some reservations about "planting evidence." [[Jolee Bindo]] and [[Carth Onasi]] will not question the morality of your action, but will worry aloud that the Selkath authorities may find out.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
